items.question: What is managed WordPress hosting?
items.answer: Managed WordPress hosting is a concierge service where all technical aspects of running WordPress are managed by the host. This includes security, speed, WordPress updates, daily backups, website uptime, and scalability.

items.question: Do you offer free migration?
items.answer: Yes, we offer free migration for your existing WordPress site. Our team will handle the transfer process to ensure zero downtime and seamless transition.

items.question: Is SSL included with WordPress hosting?
items.answer: Yes! All our WordPress hosting plans come with unlimited Free SSL certificates to keep your website and visitors secure.

items.question: Can I install any WordPress plugins?
items.answer: Absolutely! You have full freedom to install any WordPress plugin or theme you need for your website. We support all WordPress functionality.

items.question: How is WordPress hosting different from regular web hosting?
items.answer: WordPress hosting is optimized specifically for WordPress sites with pre-configured settings, caching, and security measures designed for WordPress. It includes automatic updates, staging environments, and WordPress-specific tools.

contact.heading: Need Help Choosing the Right Plan?
contact.description1: Book a short call with our team. One of WebblyHosting's specialists will help you choose the right hosting package based on your website, business goals, and budget. We want to make your decision simple and stress-free.
contact.description2: By submitting your details, you agree to WebblyHosting contacting you for support and guidance regarding your hosting needs.
